title: Deliciously Crispy American Pine Nut Pasta
description: A funky and crispy lacto-vegetarian pasta dish featuring pine nuts and bonito shave, perfect for a sick day. This American-inspired recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic.
Add the toasted pine nuts to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the bonito shave to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the pine nut and bonito mixture.
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with shaved parmesan cheese.
